title: BeeTA
description: My take on BTA's textures, made by me and mainly made for me
body:
![logo1.5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fa25e82796bf3b0f1c09eee536ff96fbcdd7d18.png)
![logo2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93fe4a5462a053f61f45d91bf942916a7d4d4c27.png)

- **BeeTA** is a texture pack/asset pack made for **BTA!**, a fork of MC b1.7.3, made by and mainly for me, giving my take and artstyle on the game's textures while mostly keeping to the original textures' palette but still adding my amateurish spices in the lot. It also doesn't have anything to do with bees.
- **T**he pack is done asset-wise but I go back and rework on textures rather frequently, discarded textures can be found in the "_Unused_" files in their respective folder paths
- **Y**ou can check various images and examples in the "**[Gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/beeta/gallery)**" tab, the numbers between parentheses to indicate the version of the pack as well as a nifty title and description!

![logo3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/781922990812fe455553a22eca0e32f9e1b6cff4.png)
